description: Golden tasks for local-first developer assistant quality checks.

tasks.title: Traceback triage
tasks.prompt: A Python service crashes with `KeyError: user_id` in production. Provide a root-cause analysis and a repair plan with testing steps.

tasks.title: Refactor plan
tasks.prompt: Create a practical refactor plan for splitting a 3000-line module into cohesive components without breaking behavior.

tasks.title: Unit test strategy
tasks.prompt: Propose a unit test strategy for a task executor with retries, replans, and timeout handling.

tasks.title: API compatibility gate
tasks.prompt: Design an API compatibility gate for CI that blocks breaking changes and reports contract drift.

tasks.title: Performance triage
tasks.prompt: p95 latency increased from 700ms to 1500ms after a release. Give a triage plan and rollback criteria.

tasks.title: Security hardening checklist
tasks.prompt: Generate a security hardening checklist for a local AI runtime that executes tools and plugins.

tasks.title: Migration script review
tasks.prompt: Review a SQLite migration strategy where foreign keys are added to existing large tables. List risks and mitigations.

tasks.title: Incident response draft
tasks.prompt: Draft a compact incident response workflow for auth token leakage in a self-hosted runtime.

tasks.title: CLI command design
tasks.prompt: Propose a CLI design for backup, verify, and restore-drill operations with clear flags and exit codes.

tasks.title: Autonomy policy levels
tasks.prompt: Define autonomy levels L0-L5 for a local assistant and map each level to allowed action types.

tasks.title: Memory conflict handling
tasks.prompt: Explain how to handle conflicting user preferences in memory and keep decisions auditable.

tasks.title: Plugin contract proposal
tasks.prompt: Design a stable plugin contract for safe tool execution, including schema validation and signature policy.

tasks.title: Replay diagnostics summary
tasks.prompt: Given a failed async run with multiple attempts, describe what replay diagnostics must include.

tasks.title: Watcher automation guardrails
tasks.prompt: List guardrails for file-watcher automations so they avoid loops, spam, and unsafe operations.

tasks.title: Release rollback policy
tasks.prompt: Define objective rollback triggers for a canary release of an AI runtime.

tasks.title: Code snippet generation
tasks.prompt: Write a Python helper function that validates required JSON keys and raises a descriptive ValueError.

tasks.title: Infra-free local setup
tasks.prompt: Provide a deterministic local setup flow for contributors so two machines produce the same environment.

tasks.title: Safe autonomous action UX
tasks.prompt: Describe UX rules for confirming high-risk autonomous actions while keeping workflow fast.

tasks.title: Bug report quality
tasks.prompt: Create a bug-report template for agent runs that makes root-cause analysis faster.

tasks.title: Roadmap compression
tasks.prompt: Compress a 6-month AI platform roadmap into the top 5 milestones with measurable outcomes.
